justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted all temporal expressions from the user throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability without offering concrete alternative slots, instead asking the user to propose new times.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant checks for availability on the same days, even after the user had explicitly broadened their search criteria for those days.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer's frustration grew significantly due to the agent's inability to find any available slots and its repetitive responses, leading to a very poor experience.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context of the topic and contact medium but struggled to intelligently expand its search or offer useful alternatives when slots were unavailable, leading to repetitive checks on the same days.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent's primary failing was its inability to proactively suggest alternative times or days when the requested slots were unavailable, instead relying on the user to propose new search parameters, which led to a highly frustrating and unproductive conversation.
